title: Huge End Flowers
description: Adds 2 new wood types to the end: Bulb Wood & Spectre Wood. Vanilla style
body:
Adds 2 new wood types to the end, found in the form of huge flowers:

Bulb flower
purple/magenta, low growing, huge underground root system, levitation themed (bring a hoe for safety!)

Spectre flower
grey/blue, moderate growing, moderate above ground root system, slow falling themed

Bone meal petals to create more saplings! Both woodsets are fully renewable (you can till/break bulb roots free of end stone and replace the end stone indefinitely)
